title: poliomintha incana
intro: Poliomintha incana, also known as Mexican oregano, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, antifungal, and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. Poliomintha incana can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
